The health benefits of Tylophora lucidus include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.

The bioactive constituents of Tylophora lucidus include tylophorine and tylophorinone, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Tylophorine has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, while tylophorinone has been reported to have antitumor and antibacterial activities.

Tylophora lucidus is commonly used in traditional medicine to prepare herbal decoctions, infusions, and tinctures.
